---
title: "Exploratory and Descriptive Statistics"
author: "Jorge Alonso"
date: "2026-05-19"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
---

# 1. Preparing, loading packages and data

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Loading packages
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Cleaning memory
rm(list=ls(all=TRUE))
gc()
```


```{r}
# Database link
raw_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jmalonso55/Applied-Statistics-for-a-Tropical-Arboretum/refs/heads/main/data/raw_data.csv"
```


```{r}
# Loading data
data <- read.csv(raw_url, sep = ",")

# Checking
summary(data)
```

```{r}
# Checking the data structure
glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
# Another way to resume data
skim(data)
```


```{r}
# Checking the first lines
head(data, 10)
```



# 2. Preprocessing the data

```{r}
# Recoding canteiros

# Type conversion
data$seção <- as.numeric(data$seção)

# Adding new variable
data$sec_cant <- paste0(round(data$seção, 0), data$canteiro)
```


```{r}
# Splitting taxonomic information
data <- data %>%
  mutate(taxon = as.character(taxon),
    taxon = str_squish(taxon),
    familia = str_extract(taxon, "^\\s*[A-Z-]+") |> str_trim(),
    resto = str_remove(taxon, "^\\s*[A-Z-]+\\s*"),
    genero = if_else(resto == "", NA_character_, word(resto, 1)),
    especie = if_else(str_detect(word(resto, 2), "^[a-z][a-z-]*$"), word(resto, 2), NA_character_),
    autor = case_when(is.na(genero) ~ NA_character_, is.na(especie) ~ str_remove(resto, paste0("^", genero, "\\s*")), TRUE ~ str_remove(resto, paste0("^", genero, "\\s+", especie, "\\s*"))),
    autor = na_if(autor, "")) %>%
  select(-resto)
```


```{r}
# Adding basal area
data <- data %>%
  mutate(area_basal = (pi * (dap / 2)^2) / 10000)
```


```{r}
# Checking habito
unique(data$habito)
```

```{r}
# Cleaning habito
data <- data %>%
  mutate(habito_original = habito,
    habito_limpo = habito %>%
      str_squish() %>%
      str_to_lower() %>%
      stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII"),
    habito_pad = case_when(
      habito_limpo == "" ~ NA_character_,
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arvore", "arboreo", "arborea, heliofila", "parvore") ~ "Tree",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("palmeira", "plameira", "palmera", "palmeita") ~ "Arborescent",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arbusto", "arbustivo", "arbustiva, terrestre, ciofila") ~ "Shrub",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("erva", "herbacea", "erva rizomatosa", "herbacea, terrestre, semi-ciofila", "herbacea, terrestre, heliofila") ~ "Herb",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("trepadeira", "trepadeira com espinho", "cipo", "escandente", "arbusto voluvel", "arbusto escandente") ~ "Climber",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arbusto, trepadeira", "arbusto/trepadeira", "herbacea, trepadeira", "subarbusto") ~ "Climber/shrub or herb",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("arbusto, arvore", "arbusto ou arvore", "arvoreta") ~ "Shrub/tree",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("bambu") ~ "Bamboo",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("cespitosa", "moita") ~ "Clumping",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("aquatica") ~ "Aquatic",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("pteridofita") ~ "Pteridophyte",
      
      habito_limpo %in% c("epifita") ~ "Epiphyte",
      
      TRUE ~ "Check"))
```

```{r}
unique(data$habito_pad)
```

## 2.1. Processing bifurcated trees

### 2.1.1. Selection single stem

```{r}
# Filtering trees with a single stem
data_fuste_un <- data %>%
  select(sec_cant, tombo, familia, genero, especie, habito_pad, altura, cap, dap, densidade, area_basal, obs) %>%
  filter(!is.na(altura)) %>% 
  group_by(tombo) %>%
    filter(n() == 1) %>%
    ungroup()
```


```{r}
# Adding stem count and bifurcation variables
data_fuste_un$n_fuste <- 1
data_fuste_un$bifurcada <- 0
```

### 2.1.2. Processing bifurcated

```{r}
# Filtering bifurcated trees
data_bifurcada <- data %>%
  select(sec_cant, tombo, familia, genero, especie, habito_pad, altura, cap, dap, area_basal, densidade, obs) %>%
  filter(!is.na(altura)) %>% 
  group_by(tombo) %>%
    filter(n() != 1) %>%
    ungroup()
```


```{r}
# Counting stems
n_fuste_bif <- data_bifurcada %>%
  count(tombo)
```


```{r}
# Calculating equivalent DBH
data_bifurcada_eq <- data_bifurcada %>%
  group_by(tombo) %>%
  mutate(dap = sqrt(sum(dap^2)), area_basal = sum(area_basal)) %>%
  filter(altura == max(altura)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Adding stem count and bifurcation variables
data_bifurcada_eq$n_fuste <- n_fuste_bif$n
data_bifurcada_eq$bifurcada <- 1
```

### 2.1.3. Merging the data

```{r}
# Merging
data_trab <- bind_rows(data_fuste_un, data_bifurcada_eq) %>% 
  arrange(tombo)
```


```{r}
# Creating logical variable for bifurcated
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
   mutate(bifurcated = factor(bifurcada, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")))
```


```{r}
# Checking work data
skim(data_trab)
```


## 2.2.2. Checking inconsistenciaes

```{r}
data_trab %>% 
  filter(familia == "ARECACEAE") %>% 
  count(habito_pad)
```

```{r}
data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(
    habito_pad = if_else(
      str_to_upper(familia) == "ARECACEAE",
      "Arborescent",
      habito_pad
    )
  )
```


```{r}
sort(unique(data_trab$familia))
```


```{r}
data_trab %>% 
  filter(familia %in% c("ASPARAGACEAE", "CACTACEAE", "CYCADACEAE", "HELICONIACEAE", "PANDANACEAE", "STRELITZIACEAE", "ZAMIACEAE")) %>%
  count(genero, habito_pad)
```


```{r}


familias_arborescentes <- c(
  "ASPARAGACEAE",
  "CACTACEAE",
  "CYCADACEAE",
  "HELICONIACEAE",
  "PANDANACEAE",
  "STRELITZIACEAE",
  "ZAMIACEAE"
)

data_trab <- data_trab %>%
  mutate(
    habito_pad = if_else(
      familia %in% familias_arborescentes & habito_pad == "Tree",
      "Arborescent",
      habito_pad
    )
  )
```


```{r}

arvore
Myracrodruon urundeuva
Rauvolfia sumatrana
Albizia polycephala
Cyclolobium brasiliense
Erythrina speciosa
Mimosa schomburgkii
Theobroma cacao
Trichilia hirta
Eugenia involucrata
Averrhoa bilimbi
Myrsine coriacea
Calycophyllum candidissimum
Calycophyllum spruceanum

arbusto
Alchornea trewioides
Bauhinia ungulata
Quercus lusitanica
Gmelina asiatica
Byrsonima crassifolia
Solandra grandiflora


```





## 2.2. Detecting outliers

```{r}
# Scatter plot
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = dap, y = altura)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 175, 200, 225)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45)) +
  labs(x = "Diameter at breast height (cm)", y = "Tree total height (m)") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85", linetype = "dashed"))
```


```{r}
# Calculating slenderness
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  mutate(rel_hd = altura/dap)
```


```{r}
# Slenderness histogram
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = rel_hd)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  labs(y = "Count", x = "Slenderness") +
  theme_classic() +
  tema
```

```{r}
# Slenderness boxplot
ggplot(data_trab, aes(y = rel_hd, x = "")) +
  geom_jitter(color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.15, width = 0.15, height = 0.05, size = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.25, fill = NA) +
  labs(y = "Slenderness", x = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  tema
```



```{r}
# qqplot
qqnorm(data_trab$rel_hd)
qqline(data_trab$rel_hd)
```


```{r}
# 5% most extreme observations
limites <- quantile(data_trab$rel_hd, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

# Adding a variable to identify
data_trab <- data_trab %>% 
  mutate(outlier_rel_hd = rel_hd < limites[1] | rel_hd > limites[2])
```


```{r}
# Scatter plot again
ggplot(data_trab, aes(x = dap, y = altura, color = outlier_rel_hd)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 175, 200, 225)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45)) +
  labs(x = "Diameter at breast height (cm)", y = "Tree total height (m)") +
  tema +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85", linetype = "dashed"))
```
